name: Export-ModuleMember

options.name: -Alias
options.description: Specifies the aliases that are exported from the script module file. Enter the alias names. Wildcard characters are permitted.

options.name: -Cmdlet
options.description: Specifies the cmdlets that are exported from the script module file. Enter the cmdlet names. Wildcard characters are permitted.

options.name: -Function
options.description: Specifies the functions that are exported from the script module file. Enter the function names. Wildcard characters are permitted. You can also pipe function name strings to `Export-ModuleMember`.

options.name: -Variable
options.description: Specifies the variables that are exported from the script module file. Enter the variable names, without a dollar sign character (`$`). Wildcard characters are permitted.

args.name: -Function
args.description: Specifies the functions that are exported from the script module file. Enter the function names. Wildcard characters are permitted. You can also pipe function name strings to `Export-ModuleMember`.

description: Specifies the module members that are exported.
